summary: Iteration 119: Culinary Recipe Builder with fuzzy search and expanded yield database (132 items). All 23 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend Culinary Recipe Builder panel and Mixology R&D Lab fuzzy search integration verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Yield database expanded from 89 to 132 items across 7 categories (dairy:18, fruit:12, grain:23, herb:7, protein:18, seafood:19, vegetable:35)
New premium ingredients: Caviar Kaluga ($280/oz), Truffle Black Winter ($500/oz EP), Foie Gras ($113.33/lb EP), Wagyu Ground ($27.50/lb EP)
New cheeses: Chihuahua ($7.20/lb), Pepper Jack ($6.80/lb), Roquefort ($25.26/lb), Gruyere ($18/lb), Feta ($8/lb), Burrata ($16/lb)
New grains with high yields: Quinoa (270%), Black Bean (250%), Couscous (250%)
Fuzzy search scoring: exact=100, starts-with=90, contains=70+, word-match=40+
Culinary Recipe Builder calculates: Total Recipe Cost, Cost Per Portion, Food Cost %, Margin Per Plate
Mixology R&D Lab Recipe Builder tab has FuzzyIngredientSearch component connected to yield DB

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Culinary Recipe Builder and Mixology R&D Lab fuzzy search working)

seed_data_creation: Yield database uses in-memory YIELD_DB list with 132 ingredients. Test recipes created with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 119 added Culinary Recipe Builder panel (sidebar: CULINARY OPERATIONS > Recipe Builder) with fuzzy search from 132-item yield database. Backend APIs: /api/yields/search (fuzzy), /api/yields/calculate (yield by cut), /api/yields/categories (7 categories), /api/yields/all (132 items), /api/yields/recipes (CRUD). Mixology R&D Lab Recipe Builder tab has FuzzyIngredientSearch component showing both Bar Ingredients and Kitchen Yields from yield DB.

features: Fuzzy ingredient search from 132-item yield database
Auto-fill yield % and EP cost from database
Tab key adds top search result
Cost summary with Total Cost, Cost Per Portion, Food Cost %, Margin

shows: Kitchen Yields with yield % and EP cost
